Class Median<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

java.lang.Object
com.djrapitops.plan.utilities.analysis.Median<T>
Type Parameters:
T - a Number object which implements Comparable (In general every standard Java number)
public class Median<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>> extends Object
Math utility for calculating the median from Integer values.
